arts.ttl: Sheffield Wednesday join Burnley in pursuit of former Premier League man
arts.sum: Sheffield Wednesday are keen on Vancouver Whitecaps midfielder Stuart Armstrong, according to journalist Alan Nixon on Patreon. Sheffield… The post Sheffield Wednesday join Burnley in pursuit of former Premier League man appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Burnley v Leeds United: Team news, predicted teams and TV details for crunch promotion showdown
arts.sum: Burnley will be out to land a crucial blow in the fight for automatic promotion when they take on Leeds United tonight.

arts.ttl: Not Tanaka: Another Leeds United man is quietly one of the best passers in the league
arts.sum: Ao Tanaka has proven to be one of Leeds United’s best signings in recent memory, but his performances mean Joe Rothwell isn’t getting the level of praise that his performances deserve either. George Massey on X shared a breakdown of Championship midfielders based on their pass completion and their key passes per 90 – to which Rothwell is the standout best in the league across both combined aspects:

arts.ttl: Leeds United's almost perfect weekend accompanied by defiant warning from Sunderland to rivals
arts.sum: Leeds United have an opportunity to make it almost a perfect weekend in the promotion race when travelling to Burnley tomorrow night. Those results leave the Blades a point behind Leeds, and Sunderland a further four points back.

arts.ttl: Morgan Whittaker sets the record straight on Burnley 'no-show' for Plymouth Argyle before Middlesbrough move
arts.sum: Morgan Whittaker has denied claims made by Plymouth Argyle boss Miron Muslic that he refused to play against Burnley prior to his move to Middlesbrough.

arts.ttl: Agent reveals why £17m Leeds United transfer 'offer' failed as FFP claim made
arts.sum: Khusanov, 20, made his Man City debut during their Premier League match against Chelsea, with his error leading to the game's opening goal inside three minutes. However, the player's agent has now revealed that the reigning Premier League champions were in talks with Lens before any bid from Leeds.

arts.ttl: Leeds United hit Emi Buendia transfer hurdle amid January interest
arts.sum: Leeds United face a significant stumbling block in their pursuit of Aston Villa star Emi Buendia, according to reports this week. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: Leeds United predicted XI to face Burnley
arts.sum: Leeds United travel to Burnley on Monday night looking to not only retain their spot at the top of the league, but lay down a marker in the top four with revenge for September’s defeat at Elland Road. Here, we look at the lineup we predict Farke to name as we travel to Turf Moor on Monday night…

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke has obvious Leeds United swap to make tomorrow v Burnley after midweek struggle
arts.sum: Sam Byram has been a very solid deputy for Leeds United since covering for the injured Junior Firpo, but the contrast in performances from both last time out means there’s only one decision to make for Daniel Farke v Burnley. Daniel Farke stresses importance of good attacking display for Leeds at Burnley

arts.ttl: Burnley are not what Leeds United may be expecting and it could blast open title race
arts.sum: The Burnley boss feels stats can be a little misleading and aware of the goal-scoring statistic, Parker is confident the rest of the division will see a change in the second half of the campaign. For Leeds a win would take them four points clear of Sheffield United in second place and six points ahead of Parker's team, while a win for Burnley would move them level on points with the Whites and turn up the pressure further in the promotion race.
